him. He later contacts exalted Venus,
Moon
Mercury and Ketu in Pisces. This de:
notes that the native may take up water
Sat. Jupt. Dh. works or electrical engineering as his
profession (the Moon -Jyoti -light).
He will be employed between 26-28 and his good days start from 35th. He
*.
will have contacts with two women.
CHART 405
The native has small head and is
attractive to look at. Moon Yen.
Mer. Sun
Mars
Jupiter has Saturn in the second Dt.
in Sagittarius. He has lost some chil
dren and is all alone at present.
The Sun representing father is
exalted. He must have been employed
in Central Government service. The
lord of the second house to the Sun Sat. Jupt. Dh.
is Venus and he is placed in Gemini
conjunct Mars. Therefore the job will be good but will not last long as Saturn
aspects Venus and Mars from the seventh house.
At about the age of 7-8-9, the native would have lost his mother.
